subject: No particles in real space of the EER file
body:
Hi,
I am trying to pre-process of Apoferritin tilt series in Warp. When 
processing EER files we noticed that we cannot see any particles in real 
space and we cannot see Thon rings in fourier space.
However, when we import its associated mrc file, we are able to see 
particles in real space and Thon rings in fourier space, please find the 
Warp Fourier & Real Space screenshots below (first EER, then MRC).

I am wondering why this is happening?

Thanks in advance.
Best wishes,
Eda 

[image: EER.PNG][image: mrc.PNG]
